name: Protected Storage Service Access
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez @Cyb3rWard0g
SIGMA Title: Protected Storage Service Access
SIGMA Description: Detects access to a protected_storage service over the network. Potential abuse of DPAPI to extract domain backup keys from Domain Controllers

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=5145 AND LOWER("Share Name") LIKE '%ipc%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%protected_storage%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Protected Storage Service Access on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=5145 AND LOWER("Share Name") LIKE '%ipc%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%protected_storage%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Protected Storage Service Access
